```python
import pandas as pd
import json

# Load the dataset
df = pd.read_csv('input_file_0.csv')

# Cast numeric columns as required
df['capacity_mw'] = pd.to_numeric(df['capacity_mw'], errors='coerce')

# Calculate the mean capacity of all power plants
mean_capacity = df['capacity_mw'].mean()

# Filter plants with capacity greater than the mean
result_df = df[df['capacity_mw'] > mean_capacity]

# Select only the 'std_name' column
result = result_df[['std_name']].values.tolist()

# Print the final result as a JSON array of arrays
print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
```
